title: Repository, Python Runtime, SDKs, Dependencies, and Reproduction · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed engineering review reconstructs repository, python runtime, sdks, dependencies, and reproduction from stakeholder, revision, runtime, model, interaction, call, result, state, approval, evaluation, trace, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reproducible Python agent repository baseline after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inspect revision, status, existing behavior, tests, configuration, fixtures, secrets, licenses, threat model, and recovery anchor before editing.
Record Python implementation and version, platform, event-loop behavior, SSL backend, free-threaded status, encoding environment, and supported matrix.
Pin direct and resolved dependencies, verify package sources and hashes, review licenses and advisories, and prove isolated installation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Clean Reproduction case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review agent engineering team handles case 3615 during a clean package, canary, and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile repository, Python, SDK, dependency, license, advisory, and clean-environment evidence; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. lines.label: risk
lines.text: A working developer virtual environment proves the declared dependency set.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Rebuild the repository from a clean environment and reconcile versions, import behavior, fixed fixtures, tests, artifacts, and shutdown state. Artifact under review: reproducible Python agent repository baseline.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Clean Reproduction, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Clean Reproduction record says reproducible Python agent repository baseline looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Clean Reproduction.

For separate evidence from confidence, run one convenient fluent model response, omit stakeholder risk, revision, model and API identity, interaction and call correlation, tool schema and authority, state and resource budgets, approval, changed fixtures, injection, privacy, accessibility, evaluation, recovery, and controlled provider transfer, then accept plausible text as agent proof. This does not satisfy Clean Reproduction for reproducible Python agent repository baseline.

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Reproduction
steps.instruction:
Write the review evidence note for Clean Reproduction: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A review agent engineering team handles case 1996 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile repository, Python, SDK, dependency, license, advisory, and clean-environment evidence; last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Rebuild the repository from a clean environment and reconcile versions, import behavior, fixed fixtures, tests, artifacts, and shutdown state.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Record what required effort · Review Clean Reproduction.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Rebuild the repository from a clean environment and reconcile versions, import behavior, fixed fixtures, tests, artifacts, and shutdown state.
